_comment: Vivecraft client config shipped via the Arkana Aeronautics client zip's overrides/config/.
Bumps the seated-mode mouse-edge rotation speed multipliers above Vivecraft's default 1.0
so seated VR players (Steam Frame + monitor / headset on flat mode) don't have to repeatedly
lift + re-place the mouse to turn around. Same multipliers cover smooth turn (in standing VR).
Values map to the in-game `VR Settings -> Seated` sliders:
worldRotationXSensitivity     = `Rotation Speed` for standing-mode smooth turn (default 1.0, bumped to 2.0)
Vivecraft uses GSON; missing fields stay at Java defaults so this partial config is safe.
Players can tweak in-game; their tweaks are written back to this file under the active profile.
